{{nihongo|'''Shitai Shrine (Asago)'''|下居神社 (浅古)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Shitai Shrine (Asago)'''|下居神社 (浅古)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Shitai Shrine (Asago)'''|下居神社 (浅古)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].
